The '''Orfites''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]] indigenous to [[Kidron/Legends|Kidron]].

==Biology and appearance==
Due to Kidron's thin atmosphere, they had four large [[Lung/Legends|lungs]] in their cavernous chests. Orfites had broad noses with large nostrils and frilled olfactory lobes. Their skin had an orange cast, with fine red hair covering their scalps and trailing down their backs. Little dimorphism existed between the [[Gender/Legends|sexes]], though females tended to have thick eyebrows. As their home world of Kidron had low gravity, most Orfites who ventured away from it required the assistance of a [[power harness]] for normal movement and comfort.<ref name="AE" />

==Culture and society==
Orfite society revolved around the sense of smell, their most powerfully-developed sense. They produced strong [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]], and used them to distinguish among one another in the same way [[Human/Legends|Humans]] distinguished faces. Orfites had a primitive society centered around a tribal gathering called a [[sahh]]. Each sahh had control over a vast tract of the Kidron jungle. They traded with off-worlders, and a small colony of refugees, through barter in native [[Kril]] meat. Orfite society was peaceful and non-aggressive leading to no history of warfare between the sahhs. They were generous and shared their resources; thieves and violent criminals were scarred and banished from their sahhs. Disgruntled individuals were free to leave their sahh and form a new one with other Orfite who shared the same views.<ref name="AE" />

The Orfites established the [[Council of Gordek]] to deal with off-world visitors and the various sahhs.<ref name="AE" />
[[File:Orfite.jpg|thumb|left|170px|Orfites with Orfite scent masks]]

==History==
The [[Orfa Olfactory Corporation]] was started through a co-op between several Sahhs and off-world investors. It produced a [[scent mask]] apparatus, which consisted of a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] connected via small tube to a belt unit. The unit held a half-liter of [[Water/Legends|water]] and was designed to accept small tablets, that it used to form the mask's inhalant. Though Scent Masks were designed to create complex pheromone entertainments for Orfites, many intoxicant tablets have been produced that had made them popular across the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].<ref name="AE" />
